contract.governs: Internal job matching trigger — evaluates developer skills against job required_skills, queues notifications, updates nextNotificationDue per cronSchedule
contract.title: Virtual Launch Pro — Cron Contract — Job Match

effects.sideEffect: Updates nextNotificationDue on each matched developer record in onboarding-records/{recordId}.json based on their cronSchedule value

required_skills.description: Skill keys to match against developer records

notifyAll.description: If true, notify all active developers regardless of skill match

notes.authPattern: x-cron-secret header — CRON_SECRET env var. Not operator Bearer token.
triggerSources: POST /operator/jobs (new job post creation) — see contracts/operator-jobs.json
Cloudflare Cron Trigger (scheduled) — fires on cadence defined in wrangler.toml
notes.matchingLogic: Worker reads all onboarding-records/ with status:active and publish_profile:true. Scores each against required_skills. Matches = any developer with skill rating >= 1 for at least one required skill.
notes.notificationScheduling: nextNotificationDue set based on developer cronSchedule: 3 days=+3d, 7 days=+7d, 14 days=+14d from system.nowIso.

additionalEndpoints.name: cronStatus
additionalEndpoints.description: Returns last N cron run receipts for operator visibility. Auth: operator Bearer token.
additionalEndpoints.response: { ok, runs: [{ eventId, jobId, matchedCount, queuedCount, ranAt, status }] }
